steps.title: Use corresponding angles
steps.content: Line $l$ is the transversal. From the figure, angle $w$ at line $j$ is in the same relative position as the marked $54^\circ$ angle at line $k$.

steps.title: Apply the converse
steps.content: If corresponding angles are congruent, then the two lines cut by the transversal are parallel. The condition $w=54$ makes those corresponding angles equal. The answer is A.
